title: senecio palustris var. congestus
intro: Senecio palustris var. congestus, commonly known as Jacob's Ladder or Marsh Ragwort, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Senecio palustris var. congestus include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health issues, but caution should be exercised due to the plant's potential toxicity.
